pre_game.message: Hey, I'm G. It’s a bit overwhelming being in a room with so much on the line, isn't it? How are you feeling about everything so far?
Nice to meet you, G. I'm C. It is a lot, but I’m just trying to stay focused since I have people back home counting on me. How are you holding up?
I’m holding up okay, just trying to keep my head in the game. I totally get that—I’ve got people back home I’m doing this for, too. It makes the stakes feel a lot higher, doesn't it?
It really does. Every decision feels so much heavier when you're thinking about them. Do you have a strategy for how you're going to approach the pool?
Honestly, I’m still figuring that out, but I’m leaning towards being fair as long as others are too—I just can't risk coming home empty-handed. Do you have a plan yet?
I’m in a similar boat—I’d rather we all walk away with something than get greedy and lose it all, so I’m looking to build some trust here first.
I'm glad to hear that; I think sticking together is the only way we all actually get what we need for our families.
Exactly. I’m hoping the others feel the same way, because if we can all coordinate, we'll all be much better off.
I totally agree. It’s just a matter of making sure everyone stays honest once the money is actually on the table. Have you talked to anyone else yet?
Just a few quick hellos so far, but I want to make the rounds and see if everyone's on the same page about cooperating. Talk soon!
Sounds like a plan. I'll do the same and see where everyone's heads are at. Let's touch base later if we can—good luck!
